title: Sundsvall, Västernorrland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Sundsvall is a city in Västernorrland with a population of 99,000. A northern Swedish city known for its stone architecture, pulp and paper industry, and winter sports.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
